## Summary
- What change is being introduced?
- Why is it needed?

## Validation completed
- [ ] Unit tests passed locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] README or operational notes updated if needed

## Release impact
- [ ] No deployment impact
- [ ] Low-risk deployment change
- [ ] Higher-risk change requiring extra review

## Notes for reviewer
- Any assumptions, follow-up work, or risks to highlight?
